channel.title: Iam on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Iam on Arrans github.io

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws
item.description: A curated list of awesome Amazon Web Services (AWS) libraries, open source repos, guides, blogs, and other resources. Featuring the Fiery Meter of AWSome.

item.title: warrant-dev/warrant
item.description: Warrant is a highly scalable, centralized authorization service based on Google Zanzibar. Use it to define, enforce, query, and audit application authorization and access control.
